title: Lepismium lineare
taxonomy: Lepismium lineare is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae, commonly known as cacti. This plant is native to South America and belongs to the genus Lepismium, which is a group of epiphytic cacti. Lepismium lineare is further classified into the subfamily Cactoideae and the tribe Rhipsalideae. It is a rare and little-known species within the Lepismium genus. Further classification of Lepismium lineare can be complex and requires specific taxonomic expertise.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections.
